package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_count_gt_zero_contains: `bytes.Count(...) > 0` instead of `bytes.Contains(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario450Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Count(haystack, needle) > 0
}
